name: Pancakes with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a skillet, add onions, and fry until golden.
2. Add mushrooms and 2 tablespoons water, cover, and cook on low heat for 5 minutes.
3. Soak bread in water, squeeze out excess liquid.
4. Mix all ingredients (onions, mushrooms, butter, salt, and pepper) together until creamy.
5. Spoon a small amount of the mixture into the center of each pancake.
6. Fold the pancakes over to enclose the filling completely.
7. Roll each stuffed pancake in remaining batter and bread crumbs.
8. Fry in hot butter until golden on both sides.
Yields 15 pancakes.
